rationale: In the citing paper, this source appears only in a grouped background citation listing prior clusterwise/model-based segmentation methods. The paper does not discuss this specific 2008 study's model, assumptions, findings, or estimation procedure in any distinct way, and it is not used as a direct benchmark in the empirical comparisons. The substantive development and validation focus instead on Flexmix and RegmixMH versus the authors' proposed Bayesian variable-selection mixture model.
